title: Readline Promises, Stream Injection, EOF, Abort, and Close Ownership
description: The loop creates multiple interfaces, reads global process streams inside domain code, ignores EOF and rejection, leaves question promises pending, and closes streams it does not own. Learners cumulatively produce injected abortable readline session adapter through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Create one readline promises interface from injected input and output and distinguish interface ownership from stream ownership.
Pass an AbortSignal to pending questions, classify abort separately, and remove or one-shot listeners without leaks.
Handle EOF, close, error, quit, and repeated close idempotently while preserving an explicit final session outcome.
